global.description: The ad features a gray background with promotional text and product display areas.
global.main_message: Promoting a new collection with a special price.

elements.label: Gray background
elements.description: A solid gray background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Product display area
elements.description: A blank rectangular area in the center, designed to showcase a product with a light outline.

elements.label: Product display area
elements.description: Another blank rectangular area in the center, similar to the previous one, for additional product display.

elements.label: Product display area
elements.description: A smaller blank rectangular area in the center, intended for showcasing another product.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A small black button at the bottom with rounded edges, inviting users to claim a reward.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A small black button at the bottom with rounded edges, inviting users to claim a reward.

elements.label: Main promotional text
elements.description: Bold black text at the bottom stating 'New collection drop €29.99' with a smaller text below it.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: A small logo at the top left corner, featuring the text 'CrispBox' in a modern font.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small yellow badge at the top right corner with the word 'SALE' in bold letters.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag at the top left corner with the text 'UGC' indicating user-generated content.
